summary: Completed testing of Exchange-Style Odds Engine (Betfair-style) upgrade. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - match page shows correct Back/Lay odds with liquidity sizes, session markets working, wallet system intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exchange-style odds engine fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/matches returns exchange-style odds with home_back, home_lay, away_back, away_lay, 3-level order book (home_back_levels, etc.), and liquidity sizes (home_back_sizes, etc.). (2) GET /api/match/{id}/bookmaker-odds returns adjusted_odds with back/lay and exposure data. (3) Odds spread is tight (1-3 Betfair ticks). (4) Liquidity is deterministic (same match returns same sizes). (5) Order book levels decrease in liquidity (level 0 > level 1 > level 2). (6) POST /api/bets works with new exchange odds. (7) GET /api/match/{id}/session-markets returns 13 markets (over_runs, fours, sixes, wickets). (8) Wallet system intact. (9) Live match tested: Multan Sultans vs Hyderabad Kingsmen (ID: 4c65aee441d663bd1e5ed2912f22fb63).

matches_exchange_odds_structure.details: GET /api/matches returns home_back, home_lay, away_back, away_lay fields

matches_3_level_order_book.details: GET /api/matches returns home_back_levels, home_lay_levels, away_back_levels, away_lay_levels (3 items each)

matches_liquidity_sizes.details: GET /api/matches returns home_back_sizes, away_back_sizes (3 items each)

bookmaker_odds_adjusted.details: GET /api/match/{id}/bookmaker-odds returns adjusted_odds with home_back=1.61, home_lay=1.62, away_back=2.52, away_lay=2.54

bookmaker_odds_exposure.details: GET /api/match/{id}/bookmaker-odds returns exposure data (home_back_total, home_lay_total, away_back_total, away_lay_total)

odds_spread_tight.details: Spread between back and lay is 1-3 Betfair ticks (home: 0.01, away: 0.02)

liquidity_deterministic.details: Same match returns same liquidity sizes on multiple calls

order_book_level_decay.details: Level 0 has most liquidity, level 2 has least (decaying pattern)

session_markets_endpoint.details: GET /api/match/{id}/session-markets returns 13 markets with over_runs, fours, sixes, wickets types

session_markets_status.details: Session markets include market_status with suspended flag

bet_placement_back.details: POST /api/bets works for back bets with exchange odds

bet_placement_lay.details: POST /api/bets works for lay bets with exchange odds

wallet_system.details: GET /api/wallet returns balance, frozen_balance, exposure, withdrawable_balance

exposure_tracking.details: Exposure is tracked after placing bets (home_back_total=100, home_lay_total=100)

match_detail_exchange_odds.details: GET /api/match/{id} returns exchange-style odds in odds object

frontend_match_page.details: Match page shows MATCH_ODDS with Back (blue) and Lay (red) columns, liquidity sizes displayed

frontend_session_markets.details: Session markets section shows over runs markets (6, 10, 15, 20 overs)

frontend_homepage.details: Homepage shows matches with exchange odds (e.g., 1.66 / 2.48)

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data. Odds API may return 401 (quota) but cached odds in DB are served through the new engine.

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/homepage_exchange_odds.png - Homepage with matches showing exchange odds
.screenshots/match_detail_page.png - Match page with Back/Lay odds and session markets

odds_engine_verification.implied_probability_correction: WORKING - Removes overround from bookmaker odds
odds_engine_verification.ema_smoothing: WORKING - Smooth movement without sudden jumps
odds_engine_verification.dynamic_spread: WORKING - Spread based on volatility (1-3 ticks)
odds_engine_verification.deterministic_liquidity: WORKING - No random(), uses hash-based deterministic values
odds_engine_verification.betfair_tick_sizes: WORKING - Proper tick increments by price range
odds_engine_verification.weighted_average: WORKING - Sharp books (Betfair, Pinnacle) weighted higher
